=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (11:18-11:35) TS377037: `Schema.decodeSync` is used inside an Effect generator. `Schema.decodeEffect` preserves the typed Effect error channel for this operation without throwing. effect(schemaSyncInEffect)
  Fix 0: "Disable schemaSyncInEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable schemaSyncInEffect for entire file"

[D2] (19:18-19:42) TS377037: `Schema.decodeUnknownSync` is used inside an Effect generator. `Schema.decodeUnknownEffect` preserves the typed Effect error channel for this operation without throwing. effect(schemaSyncInEffect)
  Fix 0: "Disable schemaSyncInEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable schemaSyncInEffect for entire file"

[D3] (27:19-27:36) TS377037: `Schema.encodeSync` is used inside an Effect generator. `Schema.encodeEffect` preserves the typed Effect error channel for this operation without throwing. effect(schemaSyncInEffect)
  Fix 0: "Disable schemaSyncInEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable schemaSyncInEffect for entire file"

[D4] (35:19-35:43) TS377037: `Schema.encodeUnknownSync` is used inside an Effect generator. `Schema.encodeUnknownEffect` preserves the typed Effect error channel for this operation without throwing. effect(schemaSyncInEffect)
  Fix 0: "Disable schemaSyncInEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable schemaSyncInEffect for entire file"

[D5] (41:7-41:23) TS6133: '_regularFunction' is declared but its value is never read.
  (no quick fixes)

  Fix 0: "Disable schemaSyncInEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable schemaSyncInEffect for entire file"
